title: Coral 56600 Endurance Scissors with Sharp Stainless Steel Shears for Wallpaper and General Purpose 29CM / 11.5 inch
features: Are you looking for quality scissors? Do you prefer long scissor blades? Do you need a comfortable handle?
These scissors will literally give you the cutting edge! Extra sharp, extra long blades help you achieve a long clean cutting action on most materials and ideal for paper hanging.
Designed for professional use, each blade is precision ground and produced to exacting standards for consistent results.
Feel confident with general cutting and working with wallpaper, fabrics, and crafts. Imagine precise long cuts, and a scissors that are comfortable to hold.
Choose these high quality scissors for a great cutting results on your next project.
description: From the manufacturer Coral Endurance Scissors High performance professional scissors Quality stainless steel blade provide an impressive long clean cutting action on most materials including wallpaper, fabrics, and craft materials. Designed for comfort and professional cutting applications. Extra sharp, extra straight, extra long blades. 11.5" professional grade scissors Precision ground, stainless steel blades Ideal for paper-hanging / cutting wallpaper Comfortable handle We’re here to make it easier for people to improve their surroundings. To all those seeking better results, Coral is a progressive tool brand creating innovative products designed to enhance your performance and help you to succeed. Our mission is to design tools and equipment to make decorating projects easier, faster, and more affordable than ever before. Trusted by skilled tradespeople and homeowners alike, our popular lines include paint brushes, paint rollers, wallpaper tools, and decorators’ preparation tools.
